privileged_info_summary: The task operates on three generic OpenRocket example designs. The setup script dynamically mutates 'dual_parachute_deployment.ork' by shrinking its main parachute diameter from 1.0668 meters to 0.254 meters (10 inches), thereby injecting a critical safety failure (excessive descent velocity) that the agent must detect and report. All existing simulation statuses in the files are also explicitly reset to 'outdated'. Output paths and the 60-point pass threshold are strictly enforced by the export scripts and verifier.
